about.title: About
about.heading: Microboat
about.intro: Full-stack engineer writing field notes on backend, frontend, infra, and the tools in between.
paragraphs: I'm Microboat. I build full-stack systems and write about what I learn along the way — the design decisions, the trade-offs, and the occasional sharp edge.
This blog is where I keep long-form notes: distributed systems, databases, infrastructure, and developer tooling. Posts are bilingual where it helps.
It runs on Next.js and Cloudflare Workers, and it's open source.
